posts.title: Automotive Journalist Detained by Police After Flock Camera Misidentified Press Vehicle as Stolen

link_metadata.description: A technology journalist test-driving a Range Rover was surrounded by four police vehicles in a Minnesota parking lot after an automated license plate recognition system incorrectly flagged his vehicle as stolen due to a data entry error.
